name: Add an API User Account
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add an API user for a 3rd party developer:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Staff users", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add new staff user", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Username"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "First Name"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Last Name"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Email address (cannot be the same as another staff user)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Password"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Complete the required fields:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Regenerate", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to create an API key for this user."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the "}, {"text": "User Permission Group", "bold": true}, {"text": " dropdown menu select "}, {"text": "API User", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ": You can also create a custom permission group by clicking on the"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add or Edit User Permission Groups"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "link. We recommend that you clone the API user group and then add or remove permissions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Username"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "API Key"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "API URL ("}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.yourdomain.com.au/do/WS/NetoAPI", "children": [{"text": "https://www.yourdomain.com.au/do/WS/NetoAPI"}]}, {"text": ")"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Provide your developer or third party the below information:"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your developer or 3rd party integration will now be able to connect to your control panel using these credentials."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": To revoke access make the user account Inactive."}]}]
